actions.name: Shackle
actions.description: Effect: The user's [Contact] attacks inflict @Affliction[slowed 5]. If a creature already has the @Affliction[slowed] Affliction they are also inflicted with @Affliction[stuck 5] and @Affliction[bound 5]. This @Affliction[bound] effect can be removed with an Demanding Movement-related Skill, Acrobatics, or Lift Skill Check taken as a Simple Action.
